message:
fix(viewer): guard global event listener binding with idempotency flag to prevent duplicates on reinit

- Add globalListenersBound and hashChangeListenerBound tracking flags to
  the Alpine.js app state, wrapping all window.addEventListener calls
  (matchMedia, show-toast, keydown, hashchange) inside an if-guard that
  prevents duplicate registration when init() runs more than once
- This fixes progressively degrading performance and duplicate event
  firing observed when the viewer reinitializes (e.g. after hot-reload
  or navigation)
- Add viewer_runtime_binds_global_listeners_idempotently test asserting
  the guard pattern exists in viewer.js
- Sync beads issue tracker and history snapshots

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
